description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design, featuring large, cushioned ear cups that are predominantly black with subtle red accent lines around the outer rims. The headband is a single, continuous arc made of a hard, matte material, likely plastic or metal, and is also black in color. The ear cups are thick and padded, suggesting comfort for extended wear, and are attached to the headband with visible hinges that allow for some adjustability. The overall construction appears robust, with a focus on both durability and comfort, suitable for urban use such as commuting or outdoor listening. There are no visible wires, indicating a likely wireless or Bluetooth functionality, and no visible brand markings or logos. The headphones do not feature any visible display or control buttons, implying that controls may be touch-sensitive or located on the underside of the ear cups.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear black headphones with cushioned ear cups and a sleek, arched headband, accented by thin red lines. The design is robust and comfortable, likely wireless and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, padded ear cups and the full arc of the headband.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the symmetrical alignment of the ear cups and the flat, wide headband.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the ear cups and the headband's curvature.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the headband and the base of the ear cups.
